module-1-profile-card-project.label: Pwojè Modil: Konstwi yon Kat Pwofil
module-1-profile-card-project.summary: Yon pwofesè vle yon sèl pwogram kat pwofil ki grandi soti nan yon senp valè ki estoke pou rive nan yon kat entèaktif byen pwòp. Chak etap kenbe kòd ki mache a epi amelyore li.

mp-1-store-profile-values.title: Konstwi premye kat pwofil la
mp-1-store-profile-values.prompt:
Vire apèsi a an premye vrè kat la. Mete `"Maya"` nan `student_name`, mete `7` nan `level`, epi apre sa enprime egzakteman:
Profile for Maya
Level: 7
mp-1-store-profile-values.hint: Estoke valè yo anvan, epi apre sa enprime de liy kat la.

help.concept: Etap sa a kòmanse vrè estrikti pwojè a. Kat la kounye a gen sòti ki gen etikèt olye de yon sèl valè apèsi.
help.hint_1: Sèvi ak `student_name` pou varyab non an epi `level` pou nimewo a.
help.hint_2: Premye liy la kòmanse ak `Profile for`.

mp-1-store-profile-values.starterCode:
name = "Ava"
print(name)

# Replace the preview with a first profile card.
# Store Maya in student_name and 7 in level.
# Then print the two profile lines.

mp-2-read-and-label-input.title: Fè kat la li antre
mp-2-read-and-label-input.prompt:
Kenbe menm aranjman kat la, men fè li pi itil. Ranplase non ki estoke a ak `input()`, kenbe `level = 7`, li vil la ak yon dezyèm `input()`, epi enprime egzakteman:
Profile for <name>
Level: 7
City: <city>
mp-2-read-and-label-input.hint: Sèvi ak `input()` pou non ak vil yo tape a, epi kontinye enprime kat la nan menm lòd la.

help.concept: Pwojè a toujou sanble ak menm kat la, men kounye a elèv la ka tape valè olye li konte sèlman sou tèks ki estoke.
help.hint_1: Non an soti nan premye antre a epi vil la soti nan dezyèm antre a.
help.hint_2: Kenbe liy nivo a nan mitan an.

mp-2-read-and-label-input.starterCode:
student_name = "Maya"
level = 7
print(f"Profile for {student_name}")
print(f"Level: {level}")

# Keep the profile card idea.
# Replace the stored name with input().
# Read the city with input() too, then add the city line.

mp-3-clean-typed-name.title: Netwaye non yo tape a
mp-3-clean-typed-name.prompt: Kenbe menm kat twa liy la. Fwa sa a, netwaye non yo tape a ak `.strip()` ak `.title()` anvan ou enprime li.
mp-3-clean-typed-name.hint: Estoke non yo tape a anvan, epi apre sa netwaye li anvan ou enprime kat la.

help.concept: Sa a se yon amelyorasyon sou menm pwogram nan, pa yon rekòmansman. Aranjman kat la rete menm jan pandan fason yo jere non an vin pi bon.
help.hint_1: Sèvi ak yon varyab pou non brit la ak yon lòt pou rezilta netwaye a si sa ede.
help.hint_2: Se sèlman non an ki bezwen netwayaj nan etap sa a.

mp-3-clean-typed-name.starterCode:
name = input()
level = 7
city = input()
print(f"Profile for {name}")
print(f"Level: {level}")
print(f"City: {city}")

# Keep the card layout.
# Clean the typed name with .strip() and .title() before printing it.

mp-4-build-full-profile-card.title: Fini kat pwofil konplè a
mp-4-build-full-profile-card.prompt:
Kenbe kat non-netwaye a ou deja konstwi a. Kounye a ranplase nivo a ak yon laj yo tape, konvèti li an yon antye, epi enprime kat fini an konsa:
Profile for <clean name>
Age next year: <age + 1>
City: <city>
mp-4-build-full-profile-card.hint: Kenbe lojik non netwaye a, chanje valè mitan an pou `int(input())`, epi enprime liy mitan ki ajou a.

help.concept: Dènye etap la kenbe pifò nan estrikti kat la menm jan an, men li fè pwogram nan pi reyalis lè li li yon laj epi kalkile ane pwochèn.
help.hint_1: Lòd antre yo se non, laj, vil.
help.hint_2: Liy mitan an ta dwe sèvi ak `age + 1`, pa laj brit la.

mp-4-build-full-profile-card.starterCode:
raw_name = input()
level = 7
city = input()
name = raw_name.strip().title()
print(f"Profile for {name}")
print(f"Level: {level}")
print(f"City: {city}")

# Keep the cleaned name.
# Replace level with a typed age.
# Print Age next year instead of Level.

try-module-1-profile-card-project-sketch.title: Gade apèsi kat pwofil la
try-module-1-profile-card-project-sketch.prompt: Mete `"Ava"` nan yon varyab ki rele `name` epi enprime li.
try-module-1-profile-card-project-sketch.hint: Bay valè a anvan, epi apre sa enprime varyab la.

help.concept: Ti apèsi rapid sa a bay pwojè a yon sèl valè ki estoke byen pwòp anvan tout kat pwofil la grandi bò kote li.
help.hint_2: Enprime varyab la, pa tèks la dirèkteman.

try-module-1-profile-card-project-sketch.starterCode:
# Store Ava in name.
# Then print name.

try_module_1_profile_card_project_sketch.title: Eseye li ou menm
try_module_1_profile_card_project_sketch.prompt: Mete `"Ava"` nan yon varyab ki rele `name` epi enprime li.

sketch-1.title: Premye kliyan kat-pwofil ou a
sketch-1.bodyMarkdown:
Yon pwofesè ap rankontre plizyè nouvo elèv epi li vle yon ti jeneratè kat pwofil olye li reekri menm enfòmasyon yo alamen chak fwa.

Pwojè modil sa a ta dwe santi tankou yon sèl konstriksyon ki konekte. Ou kòmanse ak yon kat ki piti anpil, epi apre sa ou kontinye amelyore menm pwogram nan jiskaske li li antre, netwaye non an, epi enprime yon vèsyon final byen poli.
